description: Style NoteThese sandals from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions.Product DetailsSandals with over-the-foot horizontal straps and back strap with branding, velcro and buckle closureWell cushioned footbed for all-day comfortLining for soft touch and protection from blistersTPU outsole with geometric lugs, reinforced onto the upper at the toeMaterial and CareNubuckUse a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
